dict.label: Message
dict.value:
Hi Camilla,

Thank you for contacting Workplace Support.

Currently, Workplace Rooms is still in Beta, however, we're hoping for a general release in the near future. That date has not been finalized yet but, once it is, we will certainly inform our customers. You can stay up to date by joining our Workplace Product Announcements group. Admins and non-admins can join by clicking on this link:

Fb.me/g/1vBFB9bR7/iss7tSym (https://fb.me/g/1vBFB9bR7/iss7tSym)

We appreciate your understanding. Given the information above, kindly advise whether we can close this ticket for now. Please feel free to reply to this message if you have any additional questions or concerns.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,
Petra

label_values.label: Title
label_values.value: Inviting external users to a separate page

label_values.label: Description
label_values.value: We are going to collaborate with various external Key Opinion Leaders and want to use Workplace. Ideally we would want to create a separate domain for example medistimkol.com so that it is separate from the rest of the employees. Could you help us understand the difference between that and using the Multicompany group function vs setting up a sub-sub domain? Thank you.

dict.label: Status
dict.description: Status change related to this update

dict.label: Message
dict.value:
Hi Camilla, 

Thank you for contacting Workplace Support. I am happy to help you with your query regarding collaborating with people outside your Workplace and just have limited access to specific content.

You can invite members of any community that has enabled multi-company groups to join your group. You can also invite people who don't belong to Workplace, by simply entering their email address under Add Members. 

People who are part of your multi-company group, but not your Workplace community, can't see any content in your Workplace community.

To create a multi-company group, go to Create Group and select Multi-Company.
Find more information in our Help Center:
https://www.facebook.com/help/work/254734331656422

I hope this helps. Please, feel free to contact me if you need further assistance.

Have a good day, 
Kamila

dict.label: Message
dict.value:
Hi Amanda,

Thank you for contacting Workplace Support. 

In order for us to help you further, could you please provide the following information, 

1. Could you please record a screen recording of the error you face when you try to upload the photos? 
2. Could you try uploading a different set of photos to see if it's successful? 
3. Can you provide the emails of the users who are affected with the same error? 
4. Please also provide the group link? 
5. Could you re-try to upload the photos again via a private browser, please clear cache and cookies?

Providing the above information could greatly help us in finding a resolution to the problem.

Best regards, 

Tristan
